transcript.text:
[Grill full of gopchang]
[They must get real busy!]
[Where's all of this going to?]
[All mine]
[15 servings of Gopchang (beef small intestines)]
[As a whole?]
This is crazy!
[Same...]
[This might not be enough]
[Let's order more then]
[18 servings right now]
[19 including the fried rice]
[No way]
[A heart for my subscribers]
[I love you all! ♡]
[Happy Lunar New Year]

Hello everyone
I'm here at Eunpyeong-gu, Sinsa-dong
To eat some gopchang
It's really been a while, so I'm here to recharge my body with some gopchang
I've been told that this is a hidden gem
Right over here!
[Shinsa Hanwoo Gopchang] [Eunpyeong-gu, Sinsa-dong]
Hello~
Thank you
[The menu]
15 servings of gopchang,
15 servings?
[Really...?]
[I guess...]
They gave me the liver and the omasum first
I love beef liver

The texture is amazing
Delicious!
Omasum
Even better because I haven't had it for so long
Bean sprout soup!
I have to wait a bit because they cook it in the back first
I don't think she'll be able to eat all of this because she looks so fragile
[Don't you worry]
[It's Tzuyang's favorite menu]
Thank you
Let's cook it a little more on these grills
It's going to be great
These come with potatoes They're over here
Looks tasty
This is the real deal
Potatoes and mushrooms cooked in intestine oil

-You're doing a good job -Oh, really?
[Again, her favorite]
Oh no, it's burnt
Sorry~
[Urgent care from the server]
[Surgery complete]
It's almost ready
I'll start eating from the middle
A long piece because I like eating it as a whole
Dip it in some sauce here
[Happy]
This is really healing me Amazing
Tzuyang Fighting
Thank you
That's too much
-15 servings?! -She usually eats this much

[He gets dragged out] Thank you
Gopchang is so savory
Is it usually this good?
So much flavor I think the crispy part will be good too
[Be careful when eating gopchang, the insides can be very hot]
The filling is very moist Tasty!
Some potatoes in the middle
[Cooking it in gopchang oil]
Mushroom too
Let's cut it up now!
It's hot!
A well-cooked gopchang
The chives have a hint of wasabi It's very refreshing and tasty
Kimchi with this
Kimchi goes really well with gopchang
With some chives

Let's eat this long piece
This long piece
[RIP: the roof of her mouth]
[The camera too]
Flavorful
[Sorry camera]
The explosion of the fat fillings
Yum!
Look at that
Let's cook the rest of the potatoes here
[Fill the spaces up with potatoes]
Gopchang on top
Kimchi gopchang roll Cooking it like this would be great too!
Thank you
[More kimchi]
That's impressive

You're the best
On top,
[Kimchi]
Garlic
I know this taste
Answer!
Gopchang Stew
[A kimchi gopchang stew flavor]
This looks delicious!
Potatoes cooked with gopchang is the best
With kimchi and gopchang
[Plum juice gift from a fan] Thank you so much
[Thank you!]
Cooking kimchi here would be great too!
[Execute right away]
So convenient having 2 grills

[Kimchi cooked in gopchang oil]
Plum juice
Get the cooked kimchi
Let's put them here
That's crazy!
Patiently waiting The longer you wait, the better it gets
This place has the best kimchi
She's amazing
Thank you
[More chives] Thank you
She's exceptionally good at eating
It doesn't feel greasy at all
I'm good at eating greasy food But these are very savory
It's our secret
[I wonder...]
These potatoes are crazy good

It's well-cooked
Melts right away
I want to save them for later
I can easily eat 20 packs of ramyun noodles with this kimchi
[I mean... you do it anyway with kimchi or not]
A heart for my subscribers
[The heart is disappearing...]
I wasn't supposed to eat that It's for fried rice
Abomasum sounds good too
With beef heart? To pair with fried rice...
Large intestines go well with rice too...
[Which one should I order?]
Excuse me
Can I get 1 serving of makchang (abomasum),
1 serving of daechang (large intestine),
1 serving of beef heart,

And fried rice
Can you eat all of that?
[I got you]
That's beyond impressive It's shocking
15 servings,
16 servings,
17, 18!
[Seriously?]
[Amazed]
[19th serving]
[Round 2 start]
[Fried rice is a must!]
Thank you
That's a lot
Heart first
These shouldn't be cooked for too long Let's eat these first

Topping it off like this would be good too
[Oh she knows what's up]
These usually come with onions and mushrooms
I asked them to take those out
[She's not even cutting it lol]
Let's try the makchang
[She's a research subject...]
Bon appetit
What is that?
So good!
The outside is as chewy as the pigskin
The inside feels just like pork jowl
A bite of fried rice
They give you a lot!
The fried rice is not red
It has light colors like fried rice with soy sauce

That's really unique
I thought it was very unique at first
It's really addicting
Eating them together would be good
Put the potatoes like this
Break it up!
[What did the potato do to you...?]
Yummy~
[Scraping the crispy rice]
How are you eating all of that?
It's very delicious
Do I need to buy you digestive pills?
I don't need it!
You eat that much and not gain weight?
I learned the scraping method from my grandmother
Hold the front of the spoon

Just like that
This is one of the best fried rice
It's good that you're enjoying it, but I'm scared that you're eating too much
It's because it's tasty
I was planning on only eating 15 servings
-Thank you -No, thank you!
I need to taste the daechang too
I forgot about it because of the fried rice
It comes served like this
But I asked to be extra crispy, so it's like this
Let's leave it in here since it's very hot
Come take a bath
It doesn't feel like daechang It's very crispy!
Do you want some ramyun noodles?
I want some but I don't have time
[As if that wasn't enough food...?]

That was a nice meal
Not done yet
Makchang(?) goes well with kimchi
I always get Daechang and Makchang mixed up
Last piece
[Finished]
[Just impressed...]
Thank you
It's really astonishing
She doesn't look like a big eater at all
I haven't had gopchang in a while so I enjoyed it very much
I would like to eat some more, but they're closing soon
I will have to end the mukbang here
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
